# Start Session
<!-- Run this at the beginning of every session -->

Steps:
1. Read `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
2. Read all relevant `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md`
3. Read `docs/ai/project-overview.md`
4. Read `docs/ai/mistakes.md`
5. Read `docs/ai/decision-log.md`
6. Read `docs/ai/session-start-checklist.md`
7. Output a structured session briefing:
   - Relevant repo rules
   - Recent mistakes relevant to today's work
   - Recent decisions relevant to today's work
   - Open risks
   - Explicit assumptions
8. Do not plan or code until the briefing is complete.
